properties.name: Feature: 2E ADV/DIS - Advantage & Disadvantage
properties.author: Kerry Harrison (sirkerry)
properties.description: Adds Advantage/Disadvantage roll mechanics (roll 2d20, keep the favorable one) to all four 2E d20 roll types - attacks, saves, ability checks, and skill checks. Replaces 2E's 10-button modifier stack (+1..+5/-1..-5) with a trimmed 6-button layout matching 5E's own (ADV/DIS, +2/-2, +5/-5). Correctly inverts which die counts as favorable for 2E's roll-under ability/skill checks. No changes to any stock ruleset script.

announcement.text: 2E ADV/DIS - Advantage & Disadvantage - Version 1.0 by sirkerry
